title: ScheduleBlock
description: Schedule blocks are used to block off time on a provider's calendar, preventing appointments from being scheduled during those times. They can be associated with a specific provider, office, and exam room. Common use cases include blocking time for lunch breaks, meetings, administrative tasks, PTO, or other non-appointment activities.

description.description: Description or reason for the schedule block (e.g., "Lunch Break", "Staff Meeting", "PTO")
description.title: Description

office.description: ID of the office where the schedule block is applied
office.title: Office

color.description: Custom color associated with the schedule block for calendar display
color.title: Color

practice_group.description: ID of the practice group for the associated provider (doctor)
practice_group.title: Practice group

start_time.description: Start time of the schedule block in ISO 8601 format
start_time.title: Start time

exam_room.description: ID of the exam room where the schedule block is applied
exam_room.title: Exam room

series.description: Series ID if the schedule block is part of a recurring series
series.title: Series

end_time.description: End time of the schedule block in ISO 8601 format
end_time.title: End time

provider.description: ID of the provider or doctor who owns this schedule block
provider.title: Provider

id.description: Unique identifier for the schedule block
id.title: ID

appointment_break.description: ID of an associated appointment break, if applicable
appointment_break.title: Appointment break
